title: Hello World Python Script
summary: A simple Python script that outputs 'Hello, World!' to the console.

user_stories.title: Display Hello World Message
user_stories.description: As a user, I want to see the message 'Hello, World!' when I run the script so that I can confirm it is working correctly.
acceptance_criteria: The output is displayed in the console

non_functional_requirements.requirement: The script should execute quickly and not consume excessive resources.
The script should be easy to run and understand for beginners.
The code should be clean, well-structured, and documented if necessary.

constraints: The script must be written in Python
No external libraries or dependencies are allowed
assumptions: The user has Python installed on their system
The user knows how to run a Python script
out_of_scope: Creating a GUI or web interface
Implementing error handling for invalid input
